Sunday cooking with Linda, the deepest reset of the week.
Friday 9 AM call with Grandma Rose, the weekly visit after.
Dental therapy program grid in Notion; told Emma, not Linda yet.
Heartland Free Dental Clinic Saturday — cleanings for uninsured patients.
Pulse Fitness group class at 6; the music does half the work.
Espresso in the small white cups from Grandma Rose, windows cracked.
Emma has the DJ and bridesmaids; I've got almost everything else.
Wedding budget ledger in QuickBooks, Plaid read-only linked.
Chicken parm tonight, small variations I keep secret.
Frank Sinatra Saturday morning at the right volume, even in winter.
Tigers game with Mike and Tyler when they're free.
Nagged Tyler about studying again — protective older brother.
Chris and Jake sharing best-man duties; Chris the organized one.
CE credits tracked, license renewal due in April.
Up at 4:15 with the spreadsheets; working on being kinder to myself.
Cedar Table Catering is the wedding frontrunner, tasting soon.
Drove Linda to the appointment she could've driven herself to.
Antipasto and caprese for the family — feeding whoever stops by.
Aisle Planner timeline updated, the binder tabs all named.
Diane and Linda get along, a daily relief for me.
Italy honeymoon simmering — restaurant over monument.
